overview: Raghu Engineering College (Autonomous) is an engineering college located in the outskirts of the city of Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India. Established in 2001, it is situated on NH-43, 37 km away from Visakhapatnam and 15 km away from Vizianagaram. It is an AICTE, New Delhi approved engineering institution and is affiliated to Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University - Gurajada, Vizianagaram.
